name: David Petraeus
flavor: Combined Arms (Modern) — reprising the architect of modern counterinsurgency (COIN) and the Surge. 'Clear, hold, build': secure ground, sustain the force, and out-last the enemy rather than out-gun them. Rewards territorial control and endurance.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your units currently in play.
